name: Chicken Paprikash
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces Wide egg noodles (about 4 cups cooked, drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large plastic food bag, combine flour, 2 teaspoons paprika, 3/4 teaspoon salt, and 1/4 teaspoon pepper. Add chicken and shake to coat well.
2. In a large skillet, heat corn oil over medium heat. Add chicken and cook, turning once, for 8-10 minutes or until done. Remove and set aside, keeping warm.
3. Add onions and the remaining paprika to the skillet. Sauté for 2 minutes.
4. Stir in chicken broth and bring to a boil. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 5 minutes.
5. In a small bowl, combine sour cream with half of the hot pan juices. Stir into the skillet.
6. Cook constantly for 1 minute. Toss the sauce with egg noodles.
7. Serve with chicken. Makes 4 servings.
